# services.homebridge

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.homebridge`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.homebridge.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Homebridge: Homekit home automation. |
| `services.homebridge.environmentFile` | `null or string` | Path to an environment-file which may contain secrets. |
| `services.homebridge.group` | `string` | Group to run homebridge as. |
| `services.homebridge.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Open ports in the firewall for the Homebridge web interface and service. |
| `services.homebridge.pluginPath` | `string` | Path to the plugin download directory (needs to be writeable). Seems this needs to end with node_modules, as Homebridge will run npm on the parent directory. |
| `services.homebridge.settings` | `open submodule of (JSON value)` | Configuration options for homebridge. For more details, see [the homebridge documentation](https://github.com/homebridge/homebridge/wiki/Homebridge-Config-JSON-Explained). |
| `services.homebridge.settings.accessories` | `list of (open submodule of (JSON value))` | Homebridge Accessories |
| `services.homebridge.settings.accessories.*.accessory` | `string` | Accessory type |
| `services.homebridge.settings.accessories.*.name` | `string` | Name of the accessory |
| `services.homebridge.settings.bridge.name` | `string` | Name of the homebridge |
| `services.homebridge.settings.bridge.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port homebridge listens on |
| `services.homebridge.settings.description` | `string` | Description of the homebridge instance. |
| `services.homebridge.settings.platforms` | `list of (open submodule of (JSON value))` | Homebridge Platforms |
| `services.homebridge.settings.platforms.*.name` | `string` | Name of the platform |
| `services.homebridge.settings.platforms.*.platform` | `string` | Platform type |
| `services.homebridge.uiSettings` | `open submodule of (JSON value)` | Configuration options for homebridge config UI plugin. For more details, see [the homebridge-config-ui-x documentation](https://github.com/homebridge/homebridge-config-ui-x/wiki/Config-Options). |
| `services.homebridge.uiSettings.log.method` | `string` | Method to use for logging |
| `services.homebridge.uiSettings.log.service` | `string` | Name of the systemd service to log to |
| `services.homebridge.uiSettings.name` | `string` | Name of the homebridge UI platform |
| `services.homebridge.uiSettings.platform` | `string` | Type of the homebridge UI platform |
| `services.homebridge.uiSettings.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port the UI web service should listen on |
| `services.homebridge.uiSettings.restart` | `string` | Command to restart the homebridge UI service |
| `services.homebridge.user` | `string` | User to run homebridge as. |
| `services.homebridge.userStoragePath` | `string` | Path to store homebridge user files (needs to be writeable). |
